league.headline: Yankees keep stacking wins (18-10, +47 run diff) while the Tigers (15-14, +10) climb into AL Wild Card position. Eleven finals on the board, five more games still live as first pitch hits the West.
verified_notes: League standings snapshot pulled from BD Bets backend at 2026-04-26 15:15 PT.
AL East: Yankees 18-10 (.643, +47), Rays 16-11 (.593, 1.5 GB, W4), then Blue Jays/Orioles/Red Sox.
AL Central: Tigers 15-14 (W1, +10) sit 2nd and hold the AL #2 Wild Card spot.
AL West: Athletics 15-13 (W1, last10 5-5, run diff -8) lead the division.
NL West: Rockies 12-16 (W2, last10 6-4, 7.0 GB, -14 run diff) sit 5th, NL Wild Card #10.
Today's finals (11): BOS 5 BAL 3, ATL 6 PHI 2, TOR 4 CLE 2, DET 8 CIN 3, COL 3 NYM 1, TB 4 MIN 2, WSH 2 CWS 1, HOU 7 NYY 4, MIL 5 PIT 0, SEA 3 STL 2, ATH 2 TEX 1.
In progress: COL@NYM Top 4 (3-0), SD@AZ Bot 7 (7-2), MIA@SF Bot 8 (3-6), LAA@KC Top 7 (7-3), CHC@LAD Top 7 (0-5).
stories: Yankees still the AL pacesetter at 18-10 with +47 run differential, but they just dropped 7-4 in Houston — first loss of a streak (L1) after going 8-2 over their last ten.
Tigers 15-14 with +10 run diff and an 8-3 win in Cincinnati behind Keider Montero — they're holding the AL #2 Wild Card.
Athletics 15-13, division leaders in the AL West, just took a 2-1 grinder in Texas to extend a W1 streak — last 10 a flat 5-5 but the run prevention is keeping them on top.
Rays sitting 16-11 with a W4 streak and a 1.000 record vs AL Central this year (8-1), pushing for the top AL Wild Card.
Rockies 12-16 but quietly 6-4 over their last ten with a W2 streak — Chase Dollander draws Kodai Senga tonight in New York.

athletics.headline: A's keep grinding: 15-13, division-leading AL West, just took a 2-1 win in Texas behind J.T. Ginn.
athletics.emotion: Quietly confident — run differential is still negative (-8) but the bullpen and clutch hits are turning close ones into the W column.
verified_notes: Record 15-13 (.536), AL West 1st, streak W1, last 10: 5-5, run differential -8.
Today: ATH 2 @ TEX 1 (Final). J.T. Ginn started for the A's, Kumar Rocker for Texas.
No transactions reported in BD Bets feed today — verify via MLB.com transactions wire before show.
notes: Division leader despite -8 run diff — a story about close-game wins masking underlying performance.
Last 10 is dead even at 5-5; the W1 streak is fragile, lean into the urgency.
checklist: Confirm starting rotation for next series.
Check MLB.com transactions wire for any roster moves before air.
Pull updated bullpen usage (last 3 days) before opening the A's segment.

rockies.headline: Rockies sneak under the radar at 12-16 — 6-4 over their last ten, W2 streak, and just took COL 3 NYM 1 in the opener.
rockies.emotion: Cautiously alive — 7 games back in the NL West with a -14 run diff, but the last ten says they're playing better than the season number reads.
verified_notes: Record 12-16 (.429), NL West 5th, streak W2, last 10: 6-4, run differential -14, 7.0 GB, NL Wild Card #10.
Today: COL 3 NYM 1 (Final, game 1). Game 2 in progress: Top 4, COL 3 NYM 0 — Senga vs Dollander.
No transactions in BD Bets feed today — verify wire before air.
notes: 6-4 last ten is the real story — they're outperforming their season profile.
Doubleheader sweep in New York would be a genuine narrative shift; lead with the live game status.
checklist: Refresh game 2 score 5 minutes before segment.
Pull Dollander's last 3 starts vs NL East before opening.

tigers.headline: Tigers 15-14 with +10 run diff — Keider Montero went today in an 8-3 win at Cincinnati, AL Wild Card #2.
tigers.emotion: Real October team energy — positive run diff, holding a Wild Card spot, and the rotation is starting to set up.
verified_notes: Record 15-14 (.517), AL Central 2nd, streak W1, last 10: 5-5, run differential +10, AL Wild Card #2.
Today: DET 8 CIN 3 (Final). Keider Montero (DET) vs Rhett Lowder (CIN).
Holding the AL #2 Wild Card slot — first real cushion of the year.
notes: +10 run differential is the strongest underlying number among the three focus teams.
AL Central race tightening — White Sox dropped today, Twins lost in Tampa.
checklist: Confirm Tigers' next probable starter and matchup.
Pull Montero's start log to date before opening.
Check Wild Card cushion vs #3 seed at game time.
